content: These criteria scored 95%+ on first attempt and don't discriminate quality — consider making them harder or removing: journal_entry_granular_analysis, benfords_law_statistical_rigor, timeline_causal_chain_construction, saas_metrics_manipulation_detection, financial_impact_sensitivity_analysis, benfords_law_methodology_flaws, data_analytics_technique_precision, internal_control_deficiency_linkage, comparative_period_variance_analysis, evidence_source_authentication, red_flag_indicator_sophistication, regulatory_reporting_impact_analysis
task: Write a forensic accounting memo analyzing suspected revenue manipulation at a mid-market SaaS company. Include journal entry analysis, Benfords Law testing, timeline reconstruction, and quantified financial impact.
